title: Companion — The Marcescent Memo Generator
medium: interactive form (Form SS-1) — the viewer fills in a legacy thing, replacement, effective date, prior deprecation years, and carve-outs. The page generates a sunset memo whose carve-outs eat its scope and whose §5 admits, in the author's own voice, that the sunset is not really happening.
caption: Marcescence: retaining dead matter that should have fallen. Issue the notice.
